esv_version: This is the day that the LORD has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.
niv_version: This is the day the LORD has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.
reflection: God made today just for you, like a beautiful present wrapped in sunshine. He wants you to smile and feel happy because He is right there with you. Every new day is a chance to enjoy His love.
live_it_out:
1. When you wake up, say "Thank you, God, for this happy day!"
2. Smile at someone and share a kind word.
3. Remember God made today special just for you.

esv_version: When I am afraid, I put my trust in you.
niv_version: When I am afraid, I put my trust in you.
reflection: Sometimes things can feel scary, but God is always bigger and kinder than any fear. He holds you gently and says you can trust Him. You are never alone.
live_it_out:
1. When you feel scared, whisper "God, I trust You."
2. Take a deep breath and remember He is with you.
3. Tell someone how God helps you feel brave.

esv_version: We love because he first loved us.
niv_version: We love because he first loved us.
reflection: God loved you first, even before you could say His name. His love is like a warm hug that never ends. Because He loves you, you can love others too.
live_it_out:
1. Give someone a hug and say "God loves you!"
2. Draw a picture of something you love about God.
3. Be kind to a friend today because God is kind to you.

esv_version: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
niv_version: The LORD is my shepherd, I lack nothing.
reflection: God is like the best shepherd who takes care of His sheep. He makes sure you have everything you need. You are safe and loved in His care.
live_it_out:
1. Thank God for taking care of you like a shepherd.
2. Share something you have with a friend.
3. Feel happy knowing God is watching over you.

esv_version: A friend loves at all times.
niv_version: A friend loves at all times.
reflection: God gives us friends who love us no matter what. Being a good friend shows God’s love in a special way. Your friends are gifts from Him.
live_it_out:
1. Play nicely with a friend today.
2. Say something kind to make them smile.
3. Thank God for the friends He gave you.

esv_version: Be kind to one another.
niv_version: Be kind to one another.
reflection: God is so kind to you every day. He whispers that you can be kind too. Little acts of kindness make the world brighter.
live_it_out:
1. Help pick up toys without being asked.
2. Share your snack with someone.
3. Say "please" and "thank you" with a smile.

esv_version: I am fearfully and wonderfully made.
niv_version: I am fearfully and wonderfully made.
reflection: God made you in a special and wonderful way. You are exactly who He dreamed you to be. He loves every part of you.
live_it_out:
1. Look in the mirror and say "God made me wonderful!"
2. Draw a picture of something you like about yourself.
3. Thank God for making you unique.

esv_version: Blessed are the peacemakers.
niv_version: Blessed are the peacemakers.
reflection: God smiles when you help others get along. Being a peacemaker is like bringing sunshine to a cloudy day. He helps you do it.
live_it_out:
1. When friends argue, say something nice to help.
2. Share a toy so everyone can play.
3. Pray a quiet "Thank You" when peace comes.

esv_version: I can do all things through him who strengthens me.
niv_version: I can do all things through him who gives me strength.
reflection: When something feels hard, God gives you His strength. You are never alone in trying new things. He cheers you on.
live_it_out:
1. Try something new and say "God helps me!"
2. Keep going even if it’s tricky.
3. Tell God thank you for His strength.

esv_version: The LORD is good to all.
niv_version: The LORD is good to all.
reflection: God is good to every person and every creature. His goodness is like a warm blanket around the world. You can feel it every day.
live_it_out:
1. Notice one good thing God did today.
2. Be good to someone the way God is good to you.
3. Whisper "God is good" before bed.

esv_version: Love one another as I have loved you.
niv_version: Love one another as I have loved you.
reflection: Jesus loves you with a big, gentle love. He asks you to love others the same way. It makes your heart happy.
live_it_out:
1. Do one loving thing for your family.
2. Give a high-five to a friend.
3. Remember Jesus loves you first.

esv_version: For the LORD is good; his steadfast love endures forever.
niv_version: For the LORD is good and his love endures forever.
reflection: God’s love never, ever stops. It lasts longer than forever. You can rest in that safe love every day.
live_it_out:
1. Hug your favorite stuffed animal and think of God’s hug.
2. Say "God’s love lasts forever" out loud.
3. Share that love with one person today.

esv_version: Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord.
niv_version: Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord.
reflection: Even little jobs can be done for God. He sees your effort and smiles. It makes everything more fun.
live_it_out:
1. Clean up your room like you’re doing it for Jesus.
2. Do your best at school or chores.
3. Say a quiet thank you when you finish.

esv_version: Your word is a lamp to my feet.
niv_version: Your word is a lamp for my feet.
reflection: The Bible is like a little flashlight for your path. God uses it to show you the way. You never have to walk in the dark.
live_it_out:
1. Listen to a Bible story today.
2. Ask someone to read you a verse.
3. Say "Thank You, God, for Your light."

esv_version: Give thanks in all circumstances.
niv_version: Give thanks in all circumstances.
reflection: Even on cloudy days, there is always something to thank God for. Thankfulness makes your heart light and happy.
live_it_out:
1. Name three things you are thankful for at dinner.
2. Draw a thank-you picture for God.
3. Say thank you to someone who helped you.

esv_version: Trust in the LORD with all your heart.
niv_version: Trust in the LORD with all your heart.
reflection: God wants you to trust Him with your whole heart. He knows what is best and loves you more than you can imagine.
live_it_out:
1. When you worry, tell God and trust Him.
2. Hold your hands open like you’re giving Him your worries.
3. Remember He is always trustworthy.

esv_version: Let the children come to me.
niv_version: Let the little children come to me.
reflection: Jesus loves when children come close to Him. He opens His arms wide for you. You are always welcome.
live_it_out:
1. Talk to Jesus like He is your best friend.
2. Sit quietly for a moment and feel His love.
3. Invite a friend to talk to Jesus too.

esv_version: Be still, and know that I am God.
niv_version: Be still, and know that I am God.
reflection: In the busy day, God invites you to be still for a little while. He is right there, and that is enough.
live_it_out:
1. Sit quietly for one minute and think of God.
2. Take three slow breaths and say His name.
3. Feel peaceful knowing He is God.

esv_version: The fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace...
niv_version: The fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace...
reflection: God grows good things in your heart like love and joy. They are like sweet fruit that everyone can enjoy.
live_it_out:
1. Show love by helping at home.
2. Share your joy with a giggle and a hug.
3. Ask God to grow more fruit in you.

esv_version: Oh, taste and see that the LORD is good!
niv_version: Taste and see that the LORD is good.
reflection: God is good in every way. When you look for His goodness, you will find it everywhere.
live_it_out:
1. Notice one good thing God did today.
2. Say "God is good!" with a big smile.
3. Share something good with a friend.

esv_version: Fear not, for I am with you.
niv_version: Do not fear, for I am with you.
reflection: God holds your hand and says you don’t have to be afraid. He is right beside you every step.
live_it_out:
1. Hold your hand out like you’re holding God’s hand.
2. Say "I’m not afraid because God is with me."
3. Tell a grown-up about God being with you.

esv_version: And we know that for those who love God all things work together for good.
niv_version: And we know that in all things God works for the good of those who love him.
reflection: Even when things feel mixed up, God makes them turn out good for those who love Him. He is working behind the scenes.
live_it_out:
1. When something goes wrong, remember God makes it good.
2. Pray and ask God to help.
3. Look for the good that comes later.

esv_version: In peace I will both lie down and sleep.
niv_version: In peace I will lie down and sleep.
reflection: God gives you peaceful sleep because He watches over you all night. You can rest safely in His love.
live_it_out:
1. Say a bedtime prayer thanking God for the day.
2. Think of something peaceful before closing your eyes.
3. Feel safe knowing God is near.

esv_version: Do to others as you would have them do to you.
niv_version: Do to others as you would have them do to you.
reflection: Jesus gave a golden rule that makes everyone happy. Treat others the way you like to be treated.
live_it_out:
1. Think how you want to be treated and do that.
2. Share or help the way you would like help.
3. Notice how good it feels.

esv_version: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD!
niv_version: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD.
reflection: Everything that breathes can praise God—even you! Your happy songs and thank-yous make Him smile.
live_it_out:
1. Sing a little song to God today.
2. Clap your hands and say "Praise the Lord!"
3. Thank God for the breath He gave you.

esv_version: Every good gift is from above.
niv_version: Every good and perfect gift is from above.
reflection: All the good things in your life come from God. He loves giving you gifts every day.
live_it_out:
1. Name one good gift God gave you today.
2. Say thank you to Him out loud.
3. Share one of your gifts with someone.

esv_version: Behold, how good and pleasant it is when brothers and sisters dwell in unity!
niv_version: How good and pleasant it is when God’s people live together in unity.
reflection: It feels so nice when everyone gets along. God loves when families and friends live in peace.
live_it_out:
1. Play nicely with your brothers or sisters.
2. Say sorry quickly if you argue.
3. Thank God for your family.

esv_version: God loves a cheerful giver.
niv_version: God loves a cheerful giver.
reflection: When you give with a happy heart, God is extra pleased. Giving makes joy grow bigger.
live_it_out:
1. Give something small with a big smile.
2. Help without being asked.
3. Feel the happiness of giving.

esv_version: Commit your way to the LORD.
niv_version: Commit your way to the LORD.
reflection: Tell God your plans and let Him help. He makes your day even better than you imagined.
live_it_out:
1. Say "God, I give my day to You."
2. Ask Him to guide your steps.
3. Trust Him with what happens.

esv_version: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever.
niv_version: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever.
reflection: Jesus never changes. His love for you stays steady every single day. You can count on Him.
live_it_out:
1. Remember Jesus is always the same.
2. Tell Him you’re glad He never changes.
3. Feel safe because He is forever.

esv_version: He will quiet you by his love.
niv_version: He will quiet you with his love.
reflection: God’s love can calm your heart like a gentle lullaby. He sings over you with joy.
live_it_out:
1. When you feel upset, remember His quiet love.
2. Take a deep breath and feel Him near.
3. Say "Thank You for loving me, God."
